title: GM University Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: GM University Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: The officials of GM University have released the GM University Time Table 2026 for UG 2nd and 4th semester. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: Gangadhar Meher University has officially released the GM University Time Table 2026 for +3 UG 2nd and 4th semester classes under NEP-2020 for the academic session 2025-26. The detailed class timetable is effective from 10 April 2026 for Arts, Science and Commerce streams on the official website - https://gmuniversity.ac.in. Students can download the official time table PDF directly from the university portal. Always verify all details carefully and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.
Download the GM University Time Table 2026 PDF here.

links.text: Download the GM University Time Table 2026 PDF here.

content.text: GM University Time Table 2026 has been published for the academic session 2025-26 under NEP-2020. The Gangadhar Meher University class schedule 2026 covers theory classes, practicals, yoga, community engagement and other activities for +3 Arts, Science and Commerce 2nd and 4th semesters. Students are advised to download the official time table from the university portal and prepare accordingly for their regular classes.

sections.heading: How to Download GM University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the GM University Time Table 2026 from the official university website. The process is simple and requires only a few clicks. Follow the steps below to access your class schedule quickly.

items: Visit the official website of Gangadhar Meher University at https://gmuniversity.ac.in.
Navigate to the Examination or Student Corner section on the homepage.
Look for the link titled "Time Table 2025-26 (as per NEP-2020) for +3 UG 2nd and 4th Semester".
Click on the notification to open the timetable page.
Select the PDF for your specific stream - Arts, Science or Commerce.
Download the file directly to your device.
Open the downloaded PDF and take a printout for future reference during the semester.

content.text: Students are advised to check the official GM University Time Table 2026 carefully for exact timings and instructions. Keep a printed copy handy for smooth class attendance.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in GM University Time Table 2026

content.text: The GM University Time Table 2026 contains all essential information required for daily classes under NEP-2020. It helps students plan their academic routine without any confusion.

items: Daily Time Slots from 6:00 AM to 1:00 PM
Yoga Class schedule
Core (Major) and Core (Minor) theory & practical classes
MDC, SEC, AEC and VAC subjects
Community Engagement & Services / Field Work / Internship
B.Ed. Practical and DR sessions
Subject codes and paper titles for Arts, Science and Commerce
Effective date - 10 April 2026
Notes regarding changes in schedule
